title: Nihema
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Nihema''''' was an [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvette]] that fought in the [[Battle of Mylok IV|conflict at Mylok IV]]. When the [[Habeen]] team sent two [[cargo ferry]] groups, [[Verack group|Verack]] and [[Stimner group|Stimner]], to rendezvous with, then [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin|Zaarin]] aboard the [[Nebulon-B2 frigate]] ''[[Shamus]]'', they deployed three flight groups of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]], Alpha, Beta, and Gamma. Should the need of back-up arise, ''Nihema'', along with [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]] and a small number of [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bombers]], were set to arrive to assist the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]].

{{Ship-stub}}
